one_time_description: Cumulative Impacts revenue of $15,496,747 in 2023 vs $2,003,253 in 2022, representing a large non-recurring payment related to cumulative impacts on traditional territory
economic_notes: Nation has extensive business enterprises including forestry, oil and gas services, renewable energy (Sukunka Wind Project), reclamation services, camp services, industrial supply, fibre optic communications, and nursery operations. Multiple limited partnerships active in northeast BC resource sectors.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Prior year (2022) figures were restated due to error in temporary investments reporting ($3,273,870 adjustment). Province of BC revenue of $26.1M is exceptionally high vs $3.3M prior year, largely due to Cumulative Impacts payments of $15.5M. Nation has 24 government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis plus 2 proportionately consolidated partnerships. Large construction in progress balance of $10.6M. Several GBEs carry negative equity. Annual surplus of $37.6M is significantly above budget of $9.4M due to large one-time revenues. Accumulated remeasurement gains of $1.35M reported separately. Long-term debt of $15M with majority ($11.9M) due in 2024.
